item.title: spbajko: Simon Bajkowski @spbajko · 2h Gabriel gets a yellow for moving his head towards Haaland when the pair came together. Haa
item.description: Simon Bajkowski @spbajko · 2h Gabriel gets a yellow for moving his head towards Haaland when the pair came together. Haaland also booked. No idea how that's not a red for Gabriel but I'm sure we'll hear the nonsensical reasoning soon enough 13 90 892 14 mil

item.title: spbajko: Simon Bajkowski @spbajko · 2min En respuesta a @spbajko It didn’t take long for the protection racket to emerge to tell
item.description:
Simon Bajkowski @spbajko · 2min En respuesta a @spbajko It didn’t take long for the protection racket to emerge to tell us that black is white and their colleagues are perfect again Cita The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 2h Should Gabriel have seen red? Former Premier League referee Graham Scott doesn't think so..
“The Brazil international’s late flourish looked like a potential headbutt on Erling Haaland, but he was stepping away and there was no contact that would have looked like violent conduct 1 5 366

item.title: TheAthleticFC: The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 4min Real Madrid head coach Alvaro Arbeloa called an impromptu meeting with his
item.description:
The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 4min Real Madrid head coach Alvaro Arbeloa called an impromptu meeting with his squad on Sunday, emphasising the need for commitment and professionalism for the rest of the season.
Arbeloa also spoke about the importance of unity beyond the end of this challenging season for Madrid, Mostrar más 5 5 29 3 mil

item.title:
